title: Academic Researcher
description: Academic Researchers are experts who carry out original, high-level research that generates new knowledge and progresses current understanding. Regardless of their area of expertise, researchers use objective approaches to collect data and publish their findings. As an Academic Researcher you'll apply your expertise and skills developed through study and research.
personality_traits: You are disciplined in your work
educational_pathway:
1. Complete 10 + 2 in any stream
2. Complete Bachelor's degree in any subject of
your choice followed by a Master's degree in the
same or related subject
3. Complete a Ph.D in the same or related subject

title: Accent Trainer
description: Accent is the way a person speaks. Accent trainers ensure effective communication skills involving proper pronunciation, listening, voice modulation, and speaking skills. It helps trainees effectively communicate with foreign counterparts. Accent training has become a lucrative career option with the influx of ITES businesses like BPOs, Call Centres and International Businesses.
personality_traits: You pay attention to audio details
You are creative in your teaching approach
educational_pathway:
1. Complete 10+2 in any stream
2. Complete a Bachelor’s degree (B.A.) in English or
Linguistics
Complete a Bachelor's degree followed by a
Master’s degree in the same or related field
Complete a Bachelor's degree followed by a
certificate course in Voice and Accent Training
Please check the duration of the course during enrolment

work_environment.places_of_work: Call Centres, ITES, Academies, Theatre, Film Industry, Media Industry and others.
work_environment.work_environment: You may expect to interact with people from different walks of life, different cultures, countries and regions. You will not handle a team. You are likely to work in shift. You are likely to work around 40 hours a week.
work_environment.entrepreneurship_opportunity: You can choose to be a freelancer or provide private classes.

example_from_field: Venkat Padmanabhan is Deputy Managing Director at Microsoft Research India in Bengaluru. He was previously with Microsoft Research Redmond, USA for nearly 9 years. Venkat's research interests are broadly in networked and mobile systems, and his work over the years has led to highly-cited papers and paper awards, technology transfers within Microsoft, and also industry impact. He received the Shanti Swarup Bhatnagar Prize in 2016, the ACM SIGMOBILE Test-of-Time paper award in 2016 and 2019, and the ACM SenSys Test-of-Time paper award in 2019."
source: NCERT/UNICEF Career Guide for School Students, Volume 1, April 2025

title: Assistant Professor
description: Assistant Professors teach both undergraduate and graduate students who are pursuing their own field of expertise. They have to prepare daily lessons and targets for the students, mentor the students with their academic progress. They also guide and mentor the research students in their projects.
personality_traits: You are passionate about your subject

work_environment.places_of_work: Government and Private Colleges, Schools and Coaching Institutes, Institutes Conducting Educational Research
work_environment.work_environment: As an Assistant professor, you have to work with students and research scholars. Working hours are fixed and there is scope for both full time and part-time work.

title: Career Counsellor
description: A Career Counsellor provides students, job seekers, and professionals with the support and guidance needed to reach their career goals. They help their clients understand themselves and the world of work to make good and mature work, education, and life decisions.
personality_traits: You enjoy helping others make decisions
You are knowledgeable about career paths
educational_pathway:
1. Complete 10+2 from any stream, preferably
with Psychology as one of the subjects but not
mandatory

work_environment.places_of_work: Secondary schools (mostly private), Colleges and Universities, Corporates, Education service providers other than schools, Career Counselling organisationals and institutes
work_environment.work_environment: You will primarily work in education institutes, career centers or run your private practice. You are expected to work full time and also handle different clients.
work_environment.entrepreneurship_opportunity: You can freelance or start your own business offering career guidance and support.

title: Lecturer (College and University)
description: A Lecturer is a professional who teaches a subject at a college or university. The Lecturer has the task of supporting the design, development, and production of study and teaching materials in various modules or a subject area. This ensures the efficient delivery of teaching programs according to the strategies, policies, and procedures of the university.
personality_traits: You are passionate about your subject
educational_pathway:
1. Complete 10 + 2 in any stream
2. Complete Bachelor’s degree in a discipline of
your choice followed by Master’s degree in the
same or related discipline and then qualify the
relevant competitive examination such UGC NET
(National Eligibility Test)/GATE (Graduate Aptitude
Test in Engineering)/SLET (State Level Eligibility
Test)/CSIR NET

choice followed by Master’s degree in the same or
related discipline and then complete a Ph.D in the
same or related discipline

example_from_field: Dr. Gurdeep Kaur Chawla is an Indian interpreter who is the founder and director of Indian Language Services (ILS). She has completed her B.A. and M.A. in English Literature from St. Stephen's College, New Delhi and went on to complete her PhD. She is a member of several Translator and Interpreter bodies. She has worked with the Indian parliament and US judicial system. She has worked across the globe as an interpreter and is now currently settled in San Francisco, California, USA”
source: NCERT/UNICEF Career Guide for School Students, Volume 1, April 2025

example_from_field: Dr. Sumohana S. Channappayya (Member, |EEE) received the B.E. degree from the University of Mysore, India, in 1998, the M.S. degree in electrical engineering from Arizona State University, Tempe, in 2000, and the Ph.D. degree in electrical and computer engineering from the University of Texas at Austin, in 2007. He is currently an Associate Professor of electrical engineering at IIT Hyderabad, where he is also the Director of the Laboratory for Video and Image Analysis (LFOVIA). title: Linguist
description: Linguistics is the scientific study of human language, from semantics to psychology and sociology. One of the main jobs of Linguists is to document, analyse, and preserve endangered languages by conducting fieldwork and establishing literacy programs. They work as a community to preserve a language.
educational_pathway:

title: Physical Educator
description: A Physical or Fitness Trainer helps people of different ages improve their physical health and fitness level through exercise and healthy diet. They may specialize in one or more areas, including but not limited to aerobics, weight lifting, pilates, yoga, and dance. They may lead group classes, provide one-on-one training to clients, or a combination of both. A fitness trainer can also help alleviate muscle pains and soreness which is common in players.

title: Referee (Football)
personality_traits: you will be recognised as a category 5 referee.

Federation's (AIFF) website through the
Referees Administration System of India (RASI)
portal.

four parts once or twice every year, after which
you will be recognised as a category 5 referee.

title: School Counsellor
description: A School Counsellor is a professional who works in primary schools or secondary schools to provide academic, career, college access/affordability/admission, and social-emotional guidance to all students through a school counseling program. A School Counselor's role can be specific, i.e., related to only middle school, primary school, or high school. It can also be general, related to all the students.
personality_traits: You handle confidential information with care
educational_pathway:

Master's degree in Psychology (M.A Psy/M.Sc. Psy)

title: School Teacher
description: A Teacher is an educator who guides and nurtures children in schools and equips them with knowledge in a variety of topics both academic and practical. A teacher can teach in preschool, kindergarten, primary school, middle or high school. Teachers can also be special educators with additional training.
personality_traits: You would have to qualify Teacher Eligibility
educational_pathway:
1. Complete 10 + 2 in any stream
2. Complete Bachelor's degree in any
discipline of choice and then pursue a B.Ed
degree
Complete Bachelor's degree in any discipline
of choice, pursue a Master's degree in that
discipline and then pursue a BEd. degree
You would have to qualify Teacher Eligibility
Tests such as CTET (Central Teacher Eligibility
Test) or TET (Teacher Eligibility Test) for
employment in Government schools
Please check the duration of the course during enrolment

work_environment.places_of_work: A School Teacher can work in schools (government or private) and in special needs schools.
work_environment.work_environment: Your working hours will depend on whether you are a primary, middle or high school teacher. You have to work for the duration of the school hours. Overtime might be applicable during exams.
work_environment.entrepreneurship_opportunity: You can also start your own coaching center and teach students there.

title: Special Educator
description: Special Educators are trained in communication with children with disabilities in a way that addresses the child's individual abilities and needs. They provide learning assistance to students with mental, emotional, or physical disorders by evaluating each student's progress and making reports for each of them.

You are creative in finding new teaching methods

example_from_field: Dr. Mithu Alur is the founder chairperson of The Spastic Society of India — now rechristened ADAPT — Able Disabled All People Together. She is an educator, disability rights activist, researcher, writer and published author on issues concerning people with disability in India. Alur is a pioneer in the care and education of people with Neuromuscular and Developmental Disabilities, like Cerebral Palsy, Autism, Down Syndrome and Intellectual Disabilities.
